metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace exposing claude-config-audit. Required so users can run `/plugin marketplace add MJWNA/claude-config-audit` followed by `/plugin install claude-config-audit@claude-config-audit`. Without this file, marketplace add fails with 'Marketplace file not found'.

plugins.name: claude-config-audit
plugins.description: Audit and clean up your Claude Code installation — installed plugins, standalone skills, user-scope rules, hooks, MCP servers, and project-scope config. Evidence-based, reversible via 7-day quarantine, with decision memory across runs.
